one_time_description: Province of British Columbia revenue of $49,027,249 in 2024 vs $19,168,954 in prior year - likely includes large one-time provincial transfer or settlement
economic_notes: First Nation has investments in Deh Tai Limited Partnership (99.9%), Deh Tai GP Ltd. (100%), and FNFN Forestry Limited Partnership (99.99%) accounted for by modified equity method. Portfolio investments include publicly traded securities with market value of $76,288,819 and a 49.9% limited partnership interest.
notes: Province of BC revenue jumped from $19.2M to $49.0M year-over-year suggesting a large one-time transfer or settlement. Four entities fully consolidated: Liard Hotsprings Lodge (FNFN) Ltd., Chalo Independent School Society, Fort Nelson Indian Band Land Trust Society, and Reaching For Our Vision Trust. Three GBEs on modified equity basis: Deh Tai GP Ltd., Deh Tai Limited Partnership, and FNFN Forestry Limited Partnership. Portfolio investments held in trust of $14.7M and funds held in trust (Ottawa Trust) of $10.9M are on balance sheet. Net financial assets increased significantly from $63.9M to $113.9M. Adopted PS 3400 Revenue standard effective April 1, 2023 prospectively. Tangible capital assets net book value and full balance sheet details including current liabilities and long-term debt not fully extracted from available text.
